title: HTML SEO Basics: Optimize Your Web Pages

meta.title: HTML SEO Basics – Improve Ranking & Visibility (2026)
meta.description: Learn how to optimize HTML for SEO using headings, meta tags, semantic structure, alt text, and best practices.

content.value: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) in HTML involves structuring and optimizing your web pages so search engines can understand and rank them better.
Use <h1> for the main title and <h2>–<h6> for subheadings. Proper hierarchy helps search engines understand content structure.

<meta name="description" content="Learn HTML SEO basics">
<meta name="keywords" content="HTML, SEO, Web Development">
Use semantic elements like <header>, <nav>, <main>, <section>, and <article> to improve content clarity.
HTML SEO basics help improve visibility and ranking of your web pages. Following best practices ensures better performance and user experience.

faq.question: What is SEO?
faq.answer: SEO is the process of optimizing web pages to rank higher in search engines.

faq.question: Why are meta tags important?
faq.answer: They help search engines understand page content.

faq.question: Does HTML affect SEO?
faq.answer: Yes, proper HTML structure improves SEO performance.
